title: limonium tomentellum subsp. donetzicum
intro: Limonium tomentellum subsp. donetzicum, also known as sea lavender or Statice, is a plant species within the Plumbaginaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. Its health benefits include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and aiding in wound healing, making it a popular herbal remedy. The plant can be prepared as herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil for various medicinal applications, although further research is recommended to confirm its effectiveness.
